title: 6 Essential Facts About Dental Implants Before Getting Them
article: Dental implants offer a reliable and natural-looking solution that can restore your smile to its former glory. In fact, over 3 million Americans have already discovered the benefits of dental implants! But before you take the plunge, make sure you know these 6 must-know facts about dental implants.

title: 6 Essential Facts About Dental Implants Before Getting Them
article:
1. Ensuring Sufficient Bone For Dental Implants

The foundation of dental implants is the jaw bone. When you lose a tooth, the jaw bone starts to shrink, and the longer the tooth has been missing, the more the bone will have shrunk. An x-ray will help determine whether your jaw bone is healthy and stable.

title: 6 Essential Facts About Dental Implants Before Getting Them
article:
2. The Perfect Blend Of Form and Function

Dental implants look and work like natural teeth. The titanium roots of the implants fuse with the jawbone, providing a sturdy foundation for the implants to support bridges, dentures, crowns, or overdentures.

title: 6 Essential Facts About Dental Implants Before Getting Them
article:
3. No Pain, Only Gain

The implant placement surgery involves a little local anesthesia, and the use of surgical guides allows the procedure to be pain-free.

title: 6 Essential Facts About Dental Implants Before Getting Them
article:
4. Be Prepared To Invest In Your Oral Health

The placement and healing of dental implants will take a year from consultation to final restoration, as it will start with consultations and examinations before proceeding with implant placement and temporary teeth attachment.

title: 6 Essential Facts About Dental Implants Before Getting Them
article:
5. Keep Your Implants Healthy

Dental implants are resistant to gum disease. However, they are not immune to bacterial growth, which can lead to gum disease and even compromise your implants. To protect implants, follow regular dental care routines such as brushing twice a day and flossing after brushing.

title: 6 Essential Facts About Dental Implants Before Getting Them
article:
6. An Investment For Life

With proper care, dental implants could last you a lifetime. Choosing an experienced prosthodontist and diligently caring for your implants can help you save money in the long run.
